\caption{Per-system turn-taking and response-speed detail under clean-audio conditions, pooled equal-weighted across the three domains. Each cell shows the pooled point estimate $\pm$ the percentile bootstrap CI half-width ($\alpha = 0.05$). Turn-taking rates are in $[0, 1]$; response speed is mean per-turn latency in seconds. Cells are shaded per column with darker = better (lower for latency and error-rate columns; higher otherwise).}
